title: Security Guard CV Example UK — SIA Licensed

cv.name: Marcus Reid
cv.title: Security Officer
cv.summary: SIA-licensed security officer with 5 years across retail, construction, and event sites. Skilled in CCTV monitoring, access control, incident reporting, and conflict de-escalation. Available for 12-hour shifts including nights.

bullets: Monitored CCTV and patrolled retail park — reduced shrinkage incidents by 18%
Completed detailed incident reports for police and client management
Managed crowd flow and entry searches for 50,000+ capacity fixtures
Coordinated with police and medics during emergency evacuations drills

education.degree: SIA Door Supervisor Licence · SIA CCTV Operator Licence
education.raw:
SIA Door Supervisor Licence · SIA CCTV Operator Licence
First Aid at Work — 2023
